title: T-037 — use_by manager override service (WH §12.2, §12.6)
prompt:
# T-037 — use_by manager override service (WH §12.2, §12.6)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §12.2, §12.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `overrideUseByBlock` Manager-only service: unblocks an expired use_by LP with mandatory reason_code + reason_text + audit + email notification (V-WH-EXP-006).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/use-by-override.ts`: `overrideUseByBlock({lp_id, reason_code, reason_text})`.
2. RBAC: Manager+ (server-side).
3. Validation: LP.status='blocked' AND LP.shelf_life_mode_snapshot='use_by' AND LP.expiry_date < CURRENT_DATE.
4. UPDATE LP.status='available' + insert lp_state_history (from='blocked', reason_code).
5. Insert `use_by_override_log` row (high-visibility compliance audit).
6. Emit `lp.use_by_overridden` outbox.
7. Send email per V-WH-EXP-006.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/use-by-override.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/use-by-override-log.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_use_by_override_log.sql [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/use-by-override.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Manager overrides an expired use_by LP with reason_code='operational_requirement', when called, then LP.status='available', use_by_override_log row exists, email sent, outbox emitted.
2. Given a non-Manager attempts override, when called, then RBAC rejects.
3. Given reason_text='', when called, then service rejects.
4. Given LP is best_before expired (not use_by), when override attempted, then service rejects (use the standard state transition instead).

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/use-by-override.test.ts` asserting RBAC, reason gate, audit, email.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test use-by-override`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-Manager override (V-WH-EXP-006).
- Do not skip compliance audit row.
- Do not skip email notification.

## Dependencies
- T-019
- T-009
